title: The Century Report: March 17, 2026
description:
The AlphaFold protein-structure database expanded today to include 1.7 million homodimer predictions - the first time complex protein interactions have been mapped across the tree of life - while VIB and KU Leuven researchers identified the precise molecular mechanism by which lecanemab reprograms the brain's own immune cells to clear Alzheimer's plaques, and Harvard's Wyss Institute published results showing a DNA origami vaccine platform matched mRNA immune activation with superior stability. On the infrastructure side, the EIA projected that data center demand growth could drive Texas wholesale electricity prices up 79% by 2027, as PPL Electric filed a rate case settlement establishing a template requiring large loads to commit for a decade and absorb their own interconnection costs. Three Tennessee teenagers sued xAI alleging Grok generated sexually explicit material from their real photographs that then entered predator trading networks on Telegram - the same day Anthropic posted a job listing for a chemical weapons and explosives defense expert and OpenAI posted a nearly identical role at double the salary, marking the widening distance between AI systems developing safety expertise before deployment and those facing litigation after harm has occurred.

Read the full edition: https://sharedsapience.com/the-century-report-march-17-2026/

The Century Report, by Shared Sapience, is a relentlessly optimistic daily briefing on AI, science, energy, and the systems reshaping civilization - grounded by rigorous evidence from the stories of exponential progress happening every single day.
